headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (AJG) Expands in London With Maritime Law Acquisition
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 8 Most Oversold Large Cap Stocks to Buy. Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) is one of the most oversold stocks. TheFly reported on May 7 that AJG saw its valuation outlook adjusted as Morgan Stanley reduced the price target to $265 from $275 while maintaining an Overweight rating […]
